picks.title: SpatialGen Zeus Streams Live Immersive Video To Apple Vision Pro
picks.excerpt: SpatialGen Zeus is a rack-mounted system for live immersive video workflows on Apple Vision Pro, ingesting, encoding and distributing high-quality ProRes spatial video in real time.
picks.rationale: Live ProRes spatial-video pipeline for Vision Pro opens real-time immersive workflows designers can build for now.

picks.title: Meta Preempts Google's Gentle Monster Glasses With Kylie Jenner 'Starfire' Design
picks.excerpt: Meta released 'Starfire' smart glasses designed with Kylie Jenner, featuring her voice for Meta AI and premium industrial-design styling on the same core tech as Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2.
picks.rationale: Celebrity-led industrial design on Meta's wearable-AI platform signals where premium smart-glasses styling is headed.

picks.title: Is AI creating a divide among creatives?
picks.excerpt: Over half of creatives now use AI in their workflows, but adoption skews toward those who can afford to take the risk, opening a divide in how design teams work.
picks.rationale: Data on uneven AI adoption reframes how design teams should think about access and equity in their tooling.

picks.title: What's actually in the world's first AI art museum?
picks.excerpt: Dataland, founded by digital artists Refik Anadol and Efsun Erkilic, opens as the world's first AI art museum with immersive, generative living artworks across five galleries.
picks.rationale: Anadol's Dataland makes generative living artwork a public venue, a reference point for designers exploring AI as medium.

picks.title: Miris Built a Car Configurator Without Pixel Streaming: Here's What They Found
picks.excerpt: Miris built an interactive WebXR car configurator that streams HDR-grade material fidelity at minimal file sizes, with no cloud GPU or pixel streaming required.
picks.rationale: A WebXR configurator hitting HDR material fidelity without cloud GPUs shows a leaner path for interactive product viz.
